agents.auth.notRunning: Start the agent before initiating login.
agents.auth.sharedNoPerAgentLogin: This agent uses the shared subscription. Do not log in per-agent — it decouples the agent from the shared login. Re-authenticate ONCE on the host (run `claude` on the host shell); every shared agent picks it up on its next restart.
agents.reauth.notNeeded: This agent does not need re-authentication.
billing.error.noKey: Set an anthropic_api_key in the Vault before switching to API billing.
cost.title: Cost / usage dashboard
cost.mode_api: API (pay-as-you-go) billing mode — dollar figures are ESTIMATES, computed from the token × price table.
cost.mode_subscription: Subscription billing mode — flat-rate pool; usage volume only, NO dollar figures.
cost.estimate_note: Note: at least one row is an ESTIMATE (no exact token counts were present in the session history).
cost.price_table_note: Prices are editable; every dollar figure derived from them is an ESTIMATE. Defaults come from the current model catalogue.
cost.budget_alert_tokens: Budget alert: monthly token usage ({value}) reached the configured cap ({limit}). Informational only — nothing was disabled or throttled.
cost.budget_alert_usd: Budget alert: monthly estimated cost ({value}) reached the configured cap ({limit}). Informational only — nothing was disabled or throttled.
autonomy.error.hardLocked: The '{category}' category is hard-locked at level 1 and can never be raised.
autonomy.error.invalidLevel: The autonomy level must be 1, 2 or 3.
autonomy.error.locked: Category "{key}" is locked at level 1 (safety constraint).
background.error.capReached: Maximum of 3 concurrent background tasks per agent.
channel.inbound.denied: Message from unknown chat {chatId} was dropped (not on the allowlist).
channel.reauth_needed: {agent} needs you to log in again — its session authentication has expired. Please reauthenticate it from the host.
channel.spawn_pending: Agent spawn request "{agent}" (profile: {profile}) is waiting for your approval on the dashboard.
channel.task_stuck_alert: Scheduled task "{task}" could not be delivered to {agent} (busy for {minutes} minutes). It stays queued and will keep retrying — you can cancel it on the dashboard.
channel.telegram.conflict: Another client is polling this Telegram bot token (HTTP 409).
channel.telegram.tokenInvalid: The Telegram bot token is invalid.
channels.error.notImplemented: No backend for the {provider} channel in this build.
ideas.error.alreadyPromoted: This idea has already been promoted to a card.
ideas.error.statusViaUpdate: This status can only be set by promoting, rejecting or archiving the idea.
ideas.error.titleRequired: The idea title cannot be empty.
kanban.error.nestingDepth: Subtasks can only be one level deep.
kanban.error.statusViaUpdate: Status cannot be changed by editing — move the card instead.
kanban.error.titleRequired: The card title cannot be empty.
kanban.signal.approve: ✓ The operator approved card #{id} ({title}) — continue the work.
kanban.signal.reject: ✗ The operator rejected card #{id} ({title}) — stop this work and await further instructions.
memory.digest.title: Daily digest for {day}
messaging.error.hiddenTarget: The target is a hidden internal agent and cannot receive messages.
messaging.error.reservedTarget: The target is a reserved system identity and cannot receive messages.
messaging.error.targetAbsent: The target agent was absent for the whole retry window; the message was marked failed.
messaging.result.consumedLoopBreaker: Consumed by the generator loop-breaker (generator-to-generator messages are never re-dispatched).
migration.error.pathMissing: The given path does not exist
runtime.inject.notDelivered.reauth: Message to {agent} was not delivered: the agent requires re-authentication.
runtime.reauth.needed: Agent {agent} needs re-authentication. Open its session and log in manually — credentials are never injected automatically.
runtime.start.apiKeyRefused: Refused to start agent {agent}: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY found in its environment (subscription-billing protection).
scheduler.alert.taskStuck: Scheduled task "{title}" could not be delivered to {target} for {minutes} minutes ({attempts} attempts). It will keep retrying until it is delivered or you cancel it.
scheduler.retry.cancelled: Retrying of scheduled task "{title}" has been cancelled.
skills.error.agentRequired: Local skill operations require an agent
skills.error.approvalRequired: Changing global skills requires hub approval
skills.error.duplicate: A skill named {name} already exists in this scope
skills.error.pinned: Pinned skills cannot be modified or deleted
skills.import.exists: Skill import rejected: a skill named {name} already exists
skills.import.malformed: Skill import rejected: SKILL.md is missing or malformed (name and description required)
skills.import.sourceMissing: Skill import rejected: source directory does not exist
skills.import.symlink: Skill import rejected: symbolic links are not allowed ({path})
studio.error.busy: A generation is already running — wait until it finishes.
studio.error.faceImageOnly: A reference face only applies in image mode (use a source image for video).
studio.error.jobLost: The background job was lost or the server restarted — check the Files page.
toollog.error.badPayload: Missing session id or tool name
updates.reason.alreadyRunning: Update already running (pid {N}). Wait for it to finish, then retry.
updates.reason.policyBlocked: Update blocked by the release policy (signature, version pin, or anti-downgrade). The pulled release did not satisfy the configured update policy.
updates.reason.detachedHead: Repository is in a detached-HEAD state. Check out main before updating.
updates.reason.dirtyTree: The working tree has uncommitted changes. Commit or stash them before updating.
updates.reason.notOnMain: Can't update from branch '{branch}'. Switch to the main branch first.
vault.error.idValueRequired: Key name and value are required
vault.error.noTargets: No config files contain this server.
vault.integ.comfyModelDesc: Checkpoint name for the built-in SDXL image graph (else the first the server reports).
vault.integ.comfyUrlDesc: The local ComfyUI base URL (e.g. http://comfyui-host:8188). Use Test to verify.
vault.integ.ollamaModelDesc: Local ollama model for the Studio prompt-expansion brain (optional).
vault.integ.ollamaUrlDesc: Local ollama base URL for VRAM eviction before generation (default http://localhost:11434).
vault.integ.embeddingModelDesc: Local ollama embedding model for semantic memory recall (e.g. nomic-embed-text). Empty = keyword-only search. Uses the Ollama base URL above.
vault.integ.browseAllowlistDesc: Comma/space-separated hostnames the agent 'browse' tool may open. Empty = browsing refused.
vault.integ.browseSsrfDesc: Internal hostnames that bypass the private-IP block (deliberate internal targets only). Leave empty.
vault.integ.diagramCmdDesc: Local Mermaid/DOT renderer template with {in} and {out} (e.g. 'mmdc -i {in} -o {out}'). Unset = render_diagram errors clearly.
vault.integ.whisperUrlDesc: A whisper.cpp/faster-whisper HTTP endpoint for the 'transcribe' tool. Unset+no command = transcribe is unconfigured.
vault.integ.whisperCmdDesc: Local whisper command template with {in} (e.g. 'whisper {in} --output_format txt'). An alternative to the URL.
vault.integ.updateProviderDesc: Where updates are hosted: github or gitea.
vault.integ.updateRepoDesc: The source repo for self-hosted updates (owner/repo).
vault.integ.updateBranchDesc: Branch to track; leave empty to follow the running branch.
vault.integ.updateHostDesc: Self-hosted Gitea base URL (only for the gitea provider).
vault.integ.updateTokenDesc: A personal access token for the update repo.
vault.integ.wakeCmdDesc: Remote command run over SSH to wake the GPU box (default: bash ~/comfyui-wake.sh). Only needed with an SSH wake target.
vault.integ.wakeHostDesc: user@host[:port] for SSH auto-wake of the GPU box (runs ~/comfyui-wake.sh).
vault.launchRefUnresolved: Launch aborted: environment variable {envVar} references the missing vault secret '{id}'.
vault.masterKeyInvalid: The master key file at {path} is invalid (wrong length).
vault.secretDeleted: Secret '{id}' deleted; its bindings were removed as well.
vault.secretMissing: Secret '{id}' was not found in the vault.
